title: SZL canonical decision request
description: Canonical envelope a vertical readiness pack maps a challenge input schema INTO. One SZL organ evaluates this and returns a decision (decision.schema.json). Doctrine v11 — Lambda = Conjecture 1.

request_id.description: Caller-supplied id, echoed on the decision.

vertical.description: Pack name, e.g. counter-uas / vendor-screening-889 / intel-triage.

organ.description: Which deployed organ evaluates the request.

subject.description: The thing being decided about. Vertical-specific; mapped from the challenge input schema by adapter.yaml.

context.description: Optional ROE / policy / evidence the organ needs to decide.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the request.
